nasb.text: Also righteousness will be the belt about His loins, And faithfulness the belt about His waist.

esv.text: Righteousness shall be the belt of his waist, and faithfulness the belt of his loins.

cnv.text: 公義必作他腰間的帶子， 信實必作他脅下的帶子。

ccb.text: 公义必作他的腰带， 信实必作他肋下的带子。

csbs.text: 公义必作他的束带， 信实必作他的腰带。
